uncovered_waiver.reason: OMN-14831 hand-flips node_validation_ledger_projection_compute to canonical def-B via a SIGNATURE-ONLY rename (handle(self, message: object) -> handle(self, request: ModelEventMessage)) plus removal of the ModelEventEnvelope docstring reference (OMN-14781 path). The entire extraction pipeline (project / _extract_metadata / _extract_uuid / _extract_timestamp / _extract_version_from_topic / _extract_header_correlation_id / _parse_offset) is preserved byte-identically and re-derived byte-identical base_ref<->HEAD by the ratchet from git. Equivalence is proven by that git-verbatim preservation plus the green runtime-dispatch parity tests over the selected corpus, not by a broad branch-coverage claim; the SHA-256/base64/uuid-fallback and error-context branches inside the preserved helpers are covered by the existing 24-case unit suite and only partially by the deterministic dispatch corpus.
